queries.plan:
Estimate    Actual  Operator
       1         1  PROJECT count AS _col0
       1         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(count_3) AS count
       -         1  DISTRIBUTE GATHER
       -         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(o_orderkey) AS count_3
       -         6  CROSS JOIN LOOP
 1500000         6  │└FILTER o_custkey = 1
 1500000   1500000  │ TABLE SCAN orders
       -         1  DISTRIBUTE GATHER
       -         1  GROUP BY HASH c_custkey
       -         1  DISTRIBUTE HASH ON c_custkey
       -         1  GROUP BY PARTIAL c_custkey
  150000         1  FILTER c_custkey = 1
  150000    150000  TABLE SCAN customer
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.o_orderkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer AS c
  WHERE c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    AND c.c_custkey = 1
);

theorem.description: Count ORDERS rows with a matching CUSTOMER via EXISTS with a one-sided CUSTOMER key filter
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-SEMI-ORDERS-CUSTOMER-FILTER-CUSTOMER
